meta.expr:content: data:post.snippet.escaped snippet { length: 147, links: false, linebreaks: false, ellipsis: false }
meta.name: description

meta.expr:content: data:post.snippet.escaped snippet { length: 147, links: false, linebreaks: false, ellipsis: false }

b:if.b:template-skin: body#layout,body#layout div.section{font-family:Arial,sans-serif}body#layout .locked-widget .widget-content{background-color:#fff}body#layout .add_widget a{margin-left:0;font-size:14px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.6)!important}body#layout .widget-content{padding:12px}body#layout div.section{background:transparent;margin:0 0 15px 0;padding:0;border:0}body#layout div.layout-title{font-size:14px}body#layout:before{content:"ABEFILM V4";position:absolute;top:20px;left:25px;border-radius:4px;z-index:1;padding:10px 20px;font-size:18px;color:#fff;background:#2ecc71;border:1px solid #213243!important}body#layout #menu-bottom-wrapper h4,body#layout #temabanua-trend h4{display:none}body#layout #temabanua-trend>div{margin-top:0!important}body#layout{position:relative;padding:87px 25px 0 25px;max-width:920px;margin:0 auto!important;background-color:#2c3e50!important;border:1px solid #213243!important}body#layout .visibility .editlink{background:#2ecc71 url(https://1.bp.blogspot.com/-iQoCOwqjB-w/Wy1bDznOM4I/AAAAAAAACGA/8BUOPStr0sk5oud9hWpHBQTrmkeJDoAvACK4BGAYYCw/s18-c/mode_edit_w600_24dp.png) no-repeat center!important;padding:0;margin:0;border-radius:2px}body#layout .draggable-widget .widget-wrap2{background:#2ecc71 url(https://1.bp.blogspot.com/-yTAuT5aZ1EY/Wy1eEeo4SbI/AAAAAAAACGM/FxOTPwL-Ch0_lyZxLRzhv2EWHINOmCjWACK4BGAYYCw/s22/draggable.png) no-repeat 4px 50%!important}body#layout #main-logo,body#layout #main-menu,body#layout #head-right{float:left}body#layout #main-logo,body#layout #main-menu,body#layout #head-right{width:32%}body#layout #main-logo,body#layout #main-menu{padding-right:2%}body#layout #menu-mobile{display:inline-block;width:100%}body#layout .main-footer{display:flex}body#layout #footer-widget{width:50%;margin-right:20px}body#layout #footer-right{width:50%}body#layout #copyright{width:49%;display:inline-block;float:left}body#layout #theme-button{display:inline-block;width:49%;float:right}body#layout .Blog:before,body#layout:after{padding:5px 10px;display:block;color:#fff;font-size:12px;background:#2ecc71;position:relative;border:1px solid #213243!important;margin:0 0 15px}body#layout .Blog:before{content:"Post Blog Area";margin-bottom:8px}body#layout:after{content:"Distributed by Protemlates.in";visibility:visible}body#layout #main-menu h4:after{content:" - Main Menu Link"}body#layout #main-logo h4:after{content:" - Logo"}body#layout #main-logo h4,body#layout #main-menu h4,body#layout #menu-mobile h4,body#layout .layout-widget-description{font-size:12px!important}body#layout .section h4{padding:8px 10px;display:block;font-size:12px;color:#fff;background:#34495e;border:1px solid #455668;font-weight:400;margin:0;opacity:.8;line-height:8px}

b:switch.b:if: That is AllEso es TodoIsso é Tudo

b:if.cond: data:title != "{ads}" and not (data:widget.type == "HTML" and data:title contains "getMailchimp")
data:label.name == "Movie" or data:label.name == "TV Series" or data:label.name == "Anime"

b:includable.b:comment: Clear out style (needs to be a non-empty string)

li.div:
Email: abeflixoriginal@gmail.com
Phone: +09074644272
You can also message us on Facebook/Messenger.
We value your privacy. Read more.
By using this service, you agree to our terms and Conditions. Read more.

b:widget-settings.b:widget-setting: They say whatever doesn’t kill you makes you stronger, but that’s not the case for the world’s weakest hunter Sung Jinwoo. After being brutally slaughtered by monsters in a high-ranking dungeon, Jinwoo came back with the System, a program only he could see, that’s leveling him up in every way. Now, he’s inspired to discover the secrets behind his powers and the dungeon that spawned them.
Hundreds of cash-strapped players accept a strange invitation to compete in children's games. Inside, a tempting prize awaits — with deadly high stakes.

In a remote village on the island of Carpathia, a shy farm girl named Yuri is raised to fear an elusive animal species known as ochi. But when Yuri discovers a wounded baby ochi has been left behind, she escapes on a quest to bring him home.

b:if.p: Please Select Embedded Mode To Show The Comment System.*

b:includable.b:tag: var temabanuaMessages = { copy: "", noTitle: "", viewAll: "", postAuthor: , postAuthorLabel: "", postDate: , postDateLabel: "" }

b:include.cond: data:view.isMultipleItems and not data:view.search.label and not data:view.search.query and not data:view.isArchive
b:include.name: inlineAd

b:if.cond: data:label.name == "zG" or data:label.name == "zPG" or data:label.name == "zPG-13" or data:label.name == "zPG-15" or data:label.name == "zU" or data:label.name == "z12" or data:label.name == "z12A"
data:label.name == "zPG-18" or data:label.name == "zR" or data:label.name == "zSPG" or data:label.name == "zTV-14" or data:label.name == "zTV-PG" or data:label.name == "z15"

data:label.name == "zTV-MA" or data:label.name == "zX" or data:label.name == "zNC-17" or data:label.name == "z18" or data:label.name == "zTV-Y" or data:label.name == "zTV-Y7" or data:label.name == "zTV-G"

b:tag.cond: data:post.author.aboutMe or (data:widgets.HTML any w => w.sectionId == "temabanua-related-posts") or (data:widgets any w => w.sectionId == "post-footer-ads")
b:tag.name: footer

b:if.cond: data:label.name == "Movie" or data:label.name == "TV Series" or data:label.name == "Anime"

data:label.name == "zHD" or data:label.name == "zCompleted" or data:label.name == "zOngoing" or data:label.name == "zLatest" or data:label.name == "zFeatured" or data:label.name == "zNew" or data:label.name == "zUpcoming" or data:label.name == "zReturning Series" or data:label.name == "zReleased" or data:label.name == "zEnded"

data:label.name == "Action" or data:label.name == "Adventure" or data:label.name == "Animation" or data:label.name == "Comedy" or data:label.name == "Crime" or data:label.name == "Documentary" or data:label.name == "Drama" or data:label.name == "Family" or data:label.name == "Fantasy" or data:label.name == "History"

data:label.name == "Horror" or data:label.name == "Music" or data:label.name == "Mystery" or data:label.name == "Romance" or data:label.name == "Science Fiction" or data:label.name == "TV Movie" or data:label.name == "Thriller" or data:label.name == "War" or data:label.name == "Western" or data:label.name == "Action & Adventure"

data:label.name == "Kids" or data:label.name == "News" or data:label.name == "Reality" or data:label.name == "Sci‑Fi & Fantasy" or data:label.name == "Soap" or data:label.name == "Talk" or data:label.name == "War & Politics" or data:label.name == "Western" or data:label.name == "Miniseries" or data:label.name == "Biography"

data:label.name == "Game Show" or data:label.name == "Music Show" or data:label.name == "Educational" or data:label.name == "Romantic Comedy" or data:label.name == "Detective" or data:label.name == "Fantasy Drama" or data:label.name == "Paranormal" or data:label.name == "Crime Thriller" or data:label.name == "Mystery Drama" or data:label.name == "Teen Drama"
data:label.name == "Movie" or data:label.name == "TV Series" or data:label.name == "Anime"

b:widget-settings.b:widget-setting:
1
Mcveigh
HD
Movie
2
The Many Faces of Mrs. Finn
Completed
Short Drama

Glory On The Line: The Taste of Triumph
Completed
Short Drama
4
The Dragon Escapes From Prison
Completed
Short Drama

b:section.cond: data:view.isLayoutMode or (data:view.isError and (data:widgets.Image any w => w.sectionId == "temabanua-error"))
b:section.name: Page error

input.style: width: 40px; height: 40px; border: none; cursor: pointer; background: none;

b:widget.title: Get the Best Experience on our App

b:widget-settings.b:widget-setting: We use cookies to improve your experience on this site. By continuing to use our website, you agree to our use of cookies. Learn more

p(e=""){return Array.isArray(episodes)?t?void(t.innerHTML="",episodes.forEach((l,a)=>{if(!l.episode.includes(e))return;let n=document.createElement("div");n.className="episode-card",a===m&&n.classList.add("active");let i=document.createElement("div");i.className="thumbnail-container";let s=document.createElement("img");if(s.src=""!==l.thumb?.trim()?l.thumb:defaultThumbnail,i.appendChild(s),a===m){let r=document.createElement("div");r.className="now-playing",r.textContent="Now playing...",i.appendChild(r)}else{let o=document.createElement("div");o.className="play-overlay",o.innerHTML=``,i.appendChild(o)}n.appendChild(i);let c=document.createElement("div");c.className="episode-title",c.textContent="Episode "+l.episode,n.appendChild(c),n.addEventListener("click",()=>u(a)),t.appendChild(n)}),a.forEach(e=>{e.textContent="Total Episodes: "+episodes.length})):console.warn("Episode container not found"):console.warn("Episodes not loaded or invalid")}function u(a){if(!Array.isArray(episodes)||a<0||a>=episodes.length)return;m=a;let n=window.scrollY,i={top:n};setTimeout(()=>window.scrollTo(i),100),p(l.value.trim());let s=episodes[m],r=s.videos||{Default:s.video},c=Object.keys(r),u=0,h=localStorage.getItem("preferredServerIndex");h&&c[h]&&(u=parseInt(h));let f=r[c[u]];if(e&&(e.setAttribute("data-src",f),e.src=f),o&&(o.textContent=s.episode),d){d.innerHTML="";let b=document.createElement("select");b.className="form-select server-dropdown",c.forEach(e=>{let t=document.createElement("option");t.value=r[e],t.textContent=e,b.appendChild(t)}),b.selectedIndex=u,b.addEventListener("change",()=>{e.setAttribute("data-src",b.value),e.src=b.value,localStorage.setItem("preferredServerIndex",b.selectedIndex)}),d.appendChild(b)}setTimeout(()=>{let e=t.querySelector(".episode-card.active");e?.scrollIntoView({behavior:"smooth",inline:"center",block:"nearest"})},50)}c?.addEventListener("click",()=>{i.classList.remove("show"),r.classList.remove("active")}),p(),u(0),document.getElementById("prev-episode")?.addEventListener("click",()=>{m>0&&u(m-1)}),document.getElementById("next-episode")?.addEventListener("click",()=>{m{let e=l.value.trim(),t=episodes.findIndex(t=>t.episode.includes(e));m=-1!==t?t:0,p(e),u(m)});let h=document.getElementById("toggle-layout"),f=h?.querySelector("i");if(h?.addEventListener("click",()=>{t.classList.toggle("grid-view"),f?.classList.toggle("rotated")}),n?.addEventListener("click",()=>{i.classList.add("show"),r.classList.add("active"),s.innerHTML="",episodes.forEach((e,t)=>{let l=document.createElement("button");l.textContent=e.episode,l.className="modal-ep-btn",t===m&&l.classList.add("active"),l.addEventListener("click",()=>{u(t),s.querySelectorAll(".modal-ep-btn").forEach(e=>e.classList.remove("active")),l.classList.add("active"),i.classList.remove("show"),r.classList.remove("active")}),s.appendChild(l)})}),r?.addEventListener("click",()=>{i.classList.remove("show"),r.classList.remove("active")}),Array.isArray(celebrities)){let b=document.querySelector(".entry-celebrity");b&&(b.innerHTML='
'+celebrities.map(e=>`
${e.name}
${e.title}
`).join("")+"
")}let $=document.getElementById("coshDownloadGrid");Array.isArray(downloads)&&$&&downloads.forEach(e=>{let t=document.createElement("div");t.classList.add("cosh-download-row"),t.innerHTML=`
${e.source}
${e.quality}
${e.size}
`,$.appendChild(t)}),document.addEventListener("click",function(e){if(e.target.classList.contains("cosh-download-btn")){let t=e.target.getAttribute("data-url");t&&window.open(t,"_blank")}});let g=document.querySelector(".cosh-dl-btn"),y=document.getElementById("coshDownloadModal"),x=y?.querySelector(".cosh-close-btn");g?.addEventListener("click",()=>y?.classList.add("show")),x?.addEventListener("click",()=>y.classList.remove("show")),window.addEventListener("click",e=>{e.target===y&&y.classList.remove("show")})}),function(){function e(e){let t=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("watchHistoryIDs")||"[]");t.includes(e)||(t.unshift(e),t.length>20&&t.pop(),localStorage.setItem("watchHistoryIDs",JSON.stringify(t)))}let t=location.href.match(/-(\d+)\.html/);t&&e(t[1]);let l=document.getElementById("post-id");if(l){let a=l.getAttribute("data-post-id");a&&e(a)}document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded",function(){!async function(){let e=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("watchHistoryIDs")||"[]");if(0===e.length)return;let t=document.getElementById("HTML4");if(!t)return;t.innerHTML=`

Continue Watching...

Loading watch history...
